Crystal of Arcane Steel (least).description: +1 insight bonus on weapon damage when delivering a spell through a melee attack.

Crystal of Arcane Steel (lesser).description: As least, and +1 insight bonus on the attack roll.

Crystal of Arcane Steel (greater).description: As lesser, and increases the spell save DC by 1.

Crystal of Energy Assault, Acid (least).description: Adds 1 point of acid damage to the weapon's damage.

Crystal of Energy Assault, Acid (lesser).description: Adds an extra 1d6 points of acid damage.

Crystal of Energy Assault, Acid (greater.description: Adds 1d6 acid damage plus a secondary rider effect on hit.

Crystal of Energy Assault, Cold (least).description: Adds 1 point of cold damage to the weapon's damage.

Crystal of Energy Assault, Cold (lesser).description: Adds an extra 1d6 points of cold damage.

Crystal of Energy Assault, Cold (greater.description: Adds 1d6 cold damage plus a secondary rider effect on hit.

Crystal of Energy Assault, Electricity (.description: Adds 1 point of electricity damage to the weapon's damage.
Adds an extra 1d6 points of electricity damage.
Adds 1d6 electricity damage plus a secondary rider effect on hit.

Crystal of Energy Assault, Fire (least).description: Adds 1 point of fire damage to the weapon's damage.

Crystal of Energy Assault, Fire (lesser).description: Adds an extra 1d6 points of fire damage.

Crystal of Energy Assault, Fire (greater.description: Adds 1d6 fire damage plus a secondary rider effect on hit.

Crystal of Illumination (least).description: Swift (command): weapon sheds bright light 5 ft. and shadowy light 5 ft. beyond.

Crystal of Illumination (lesser).description: Bright light 20 ft. and shadowy light 20 ft. beyond.

Crystal of Illumination (greater).description: Bright light 60 ft. and shadowy light 60 ft. beyond.

Crystal of Life Drinking (least).description: Heal 1 hp per hit on a living creature (max 10 hp/day, then inert until next day).

Crystal of Return (least).description: Draw the weapon as a free action.

Crystal of Return (lesser).description: As least, and call the weapon from up to 30 ft. away as a move action.

Crystal of Return (greater).description: As lesser, and thrown weapons also gain the returning property.

Crystal of Security (least).description: +2 bonus on checks to draw the weapon or keep it in your hand.

Demolition Crystal (lesser).description: As least, and weapon counts as adamantine vs. construct DR.

Demolition Crystal (greater).description: As lesser, and weapon can sneak attack and critically hit constructs.

Fiendslayer Crystal (lesser).description: As least, and weapon counts as good-aligned for overcoming DR.

Fiendslayer Crystal (greater).description: As lesser, and a critical hit prevents teleportation for 1 round.

Phoenix Ash Threat (least).description: Target hit last round takes 1 fire damage at the start of your turn.

Revelation Crystal (least).description: Invisible creature you damage glows for 1 round (reveals its square).

Revelation Crystal (lesser).description: Also suppresses invisibility effects for 1 round.

Revelation Crystal (greater).description: Also suppresses blur/displacement-like concealment for 1 round.

Truedeath Crystal (lesser).description: As least, and weapon functions as ghost touch.

Truedeath Crystal (greater).description: As lesser, and weapon can sneak attack and critically hit undead.

Witchlight Reservoir.description: Greater crystal. Swift (mental): imbue next melee hit with sunlight (+2d6 fire, +4d6 vs undead), moonlight (+2d6 electricity, +4d6 vs lycanthropes), blood (+2d6 vs living), or wine (–2 Will saves 1 round) depending on 8-hour exposure. Functions 5 times before re-imbuing.
